title: Support all-location Loosefruit runner
description: Update the existing delete_loosefruit runner so selected targets from multiple LocCodes are grouped and processed sequentially, one saved Plantware session per LocCode, while preserving dry-run and delete verification behavior.
convergence: Single LocCode payload behavior remains unchanged.
Multiple LocCodes no longer throw before processing.
Runner emits loosefruit group and target events with doc_id, loc_code, status, message.
Dry run and actual delete verification still work.
